name: reduced-ODE harness — Abrams 2008 two-population chimera vs annealMusic finite-N
provenance: All equations transcribed from Abrams, Mirollo, Strogatz & Wiley, PRL 101, 084103 (2008), arXiv:0806.0594v2 (Aug 26 2008, postdates the published erratum PRL 101, 129902). Eq. numbers cited inline in reduced_core.py.

conventions._note: Match the shipped integrator (campaign CP0): K11=K22=mu, K12=K21=nu, mu+nu=1, A=mu-nu so mu=(1+A)/2, nu=(1-A)/2; alpha=pi/2-beta; omega=0 (rotating frame). Verified consistent with tools/chimera-campaign/integrator.mjs.

series._note: Eq. (17) saddle-node and Eq. (18) Hopf, in powers of beta. sqrt3 = 1.7320508075688772.

integrator._note: Adaptive Runge-Kutta (Dormand-Prince 8(5,3)) via scipy.solve_ivp. Tight tolerances: the reduced system is microseconds per run, so accuracy is free.

fixed_point._note: Eqs (13)-(14): sweep psi, get r from (14) (drop psi where the radicand is non-positive), A from (13). Gate (a) checks rdot=psidot=0 at each (r,A,beta).

classify._note: Paper Fig. 2 regimes at beta=0.1. Integrate the 2-D system from just off the stationary-chimera fixed point; classify constant (stable FP) vs limit cycle and report the period.

bifurcation_locate._note: Numerically locate SN (det J=0) and Hopf (tr J=0, det J>0) along the Eqs (13)-(14) fixed-point family by zero-crossing + brentq refinement.

homoclinic._note: At beta=0.05 increase A above Hopf; the breathing limit cycle's period diverges and it collides with the saddle (homoclinic). Bisection on A: 'cycle persists (bounded breathing)' vs 'escapes to sync (r->1)'. Reports the bracketing interval A_hc.

timescale._note: Campaign CP0 fact: the integrator advances 1 model-time unit per second (DRIFT_DT=0.05 control step, ω=0 rotating frame; integrator.mjs docstring: '1 unit := 1 s'). So reduced model-time equals seconds 1:1 — no fudge factor.

boundary._note: Maps the finite-N absorption-grade label into the reduced flow. Capture = first time min(rho1,rho2) crosses theta=0.85 and never dips back below recoveryThreshold=0.8 for recoveryWindowSec thereafter (deterministic reduced flow => the crossing is effectively permanent at A=0.5). theta/recThresh/recWin copied from absorption.config.json.

cp4._note: Per A=0.5 run: rho2(0)=Rincoh0, rho1(0)=Rsync0, psi(0)=dphi0 (all precomputed from the logged seed in transient-tests CP2). Integrate the 3-D system to capture; correlate reduced capture time with measured t_abs.

measured._note: Read-only finite-N benchmarks from prior campaigns, for CP3/CP4 comparison. No fitting to these.

predictions.P1: A=0.2 at beta=0.05 lies in the stable stationary-chimera band (between SN and Hopf): the never-absorbers are a genuine attractor.
predictions.P2: A=0.5 at beta=0.05 is post-homoclinic (A>A_hc): no chimera attractor, sync globally attracting, the ratcheting transient is the spiral-out along the destroyed cycle's ghost.
